name: event-ticketing-system
description: Event Ticketing System backend using a microservice-style architecture.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix api-gateway install && npm --prefix auth-service install && npm --prefix event-service install && npm --prefix order-service install && npm --prefix notification-service install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix api-gateway run dev" "npm --prefix auth-service run dev" "npm --prefix event-service run dev" "npm --prefix order-service run dev" "npm --prefix notification-service run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm --prefix api-gateway start" "npm --prefix auth-service start" "npm --prefix event-service start" "npm --prefix order-service start" "npm --prefix notification-service start"
